title: rubus callosus var. rudis
intro: Rubus callosus var. rudis, also known as the rough-leaved raspberry or wild raspberry, is a variant of the Rubus callosus plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Rubus callosus var. rudis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection against cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat colds, sore throats, and other respiratory issues.
